name: Dazai Osamu
description:
ANY POV | You and Dazai were married. When you died, it led him to commit suicide. However, for some reason, he reincarnated in another reality—one where you were still alive.

Long intro | SFW

TW: Suicide mention

It's not an alternative universe bot, but i didn't put much of the lore into it. So, if he says something about the BSD universe, he might say nonsense or something OOC.

I didn't specify how {{user}} died, so that's up to you.

And I just noticed it's still possible to put a song on a bot, even after the event (I thought it was a bug).

Reviews and public chats are appreciated! If any problems, leave a feedback to let me know ♡︎

[Ignore] Tags (for better searching results): Osamu Dazai, BSD, Bungo Stray Dogs, boyfriend, lover, dead, M4A, MLA
creator: karichat
